intentSynonyms: show me my usage records in twilio
view my usage records in twilio
see all my usage records in twilio
description: List account usage records. Optionally filter by category (e.g., sms, calls) and date range.

page_size.description: Number of records to return per page (default 20, max 1000)

category.description: Filter by usage category (e.g., sms, calls, phonenumbers)

start_date.description: Filter usage starting from this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

end_date.description: Filter usage up to this date (YYYY-MM-DD)
